---
title: "Build Configuration"
description: "Maintained CMake switches for platforms, testing, dependencies, and diagnostics."
audience: developer
status: current
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

## Platform selection

Set `PLATFORMS` to `SERIAL`, `OPENMP`, `CUDA`, `HIP`, or the supported SYCL
configuration. Accelerator builds also set `ARCH` to the target architecture,
for example `AMPERE80`.

## OPALX options

| Option | Default | Effect |
|---|---:|---|
| `OPALX_ENABLE_UNIT_TESTS` | `OFF` | Build GoogleTest unit tests. |
| `OPALX_ENABLE_EXAMPLES` | `OFF` | Build the example module. |
| `OPALX_ENABLE_TESTS` | `OFF` | Build integration tests. |
| `OPALX_ENABLE_COVERAGE` | `OFF` | Enable coverage instrumentation. |
| `OPALX_ENABLE_SANITIZER` | `OFF` | Enable configured sanitizer tooling. |
| `OPALX_ENABLE_HIP_PROFILER` | `OFF` | Add HIP profiler support. |
| `OPALX_ENABLE_NSYS_PROFILER` | `OFF` | Add NVIDIA Nsight Systems support. |
| `OPALX_USE_STANDARD_FOLDERS` | `OFF` | Use build-tree `bin/` and `lib/` directories. |
| `OPALX_FIELD_DEBUG` | `OFF` | Enable field-solver debug dumps. |
| `OPALX_EMBED_BUILD_METADATA` | `OFF` | Embed user, machine, and build-date metadata. |

Installed dependency switches exist for HDF5, H5hut, and GoogleTest. IPPL,
Kokkos, and heFFTe versions can be selected through their documented CMake
cache variables. Recheck defaults in the root CMake files when preparing a
release because dependency versions evolve more quickly than prose.
